requirement_topic.en: Vanuatu Grid Connection - 230/400 V, 50 Hz and Utility Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 瓦努阿图电网接入——230/400 V、50 Hz及公用事业验收
requirement_topic.zht: 萬那杜電網接入——230/400 V、50 Hz及公用事業驗收

summary.en: Vanuatu's low-voltage supply is commonly 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. Electricity supply is regulated by the Utilities Regulatory Authority (URA), with UNELCO operating the Port Vila concession and Vanuatu Utilities and Infrastructure (VUI) serving other licensed areas. Grid-connected EV charger projects should be checked with the relevant utility or concessionaire for available supply capacity, metering, protection coordination, earthing, voltage drop, harmonic injection, load management, commissioning, cyclone resilience, and site-access logistics. Vanuatu has the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the 230/400 V nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline.
summary.zh: 瓦努阿图低压供电通常为230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。电力供应由公用事业监管局（URA）监管，UNELCO运营维拉港特许经营区，Vanuatu Utilities and Infrastructure（VUI）服务其他获许可区域。并网电动汽车充电项目应与相关公用事业或特许经营方核查可用供电容量、计量、保护配合、接地、电压降、谐波注入、负载管理、调试、气旋韧性和现场进入物流。瓦努阿图与中国同为50 Hz频率，但230/400 V标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。
summary.zht: 萬那杜低壓供電通常為230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。電力供應由公用事業監管局（URA）監管，UNELCO運營維拉港特許經營區，Vanuatu Utilities and Infrastructure（VUI）服務其他獲許可區域。併網電動汽車充電項目應與相關公用事業或特許經營方核查可用供電容量、計量、保護配合、接地、電壓降、諧波注入、負載管理、調試、氣旋韌性和現場進入物流。萬那杜與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但230/400 V標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。

standards_or_laws: Vanuatu Utilities Regulatory Authority (URA) electricity-sector regulation
UNELCO Port Vila electricity concession requirements
Vanuatu Utilities and Infrastructure (VUI) electricity service requirements
IEC 61000 series - electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1 - EV conductive charging system general requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. Vanuatu has the same 50 Hz frequency as China but a different nominal voltage at 230/400 V, so China domestic ratings and protection settings cannot be assumed to transfer without confirmation.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信及当地电网运营商验收准备文件。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。瓦努阿图标称频率相同，但标称电压为230/400 V，与中国不同，因此不能假定中国国内额定值和保护设置无需确认即可适用。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊及當地電網運營商驗收準備文件。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。萬那杜標稱頻率相同，但標稱電壓為230/400 V，與中國不同，因此不能假定中國國內額定值和保護設置無需確認即可適用。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm input-voltage range, over/under-voltage thresholds, breaker and RCD ratings, cable sizing, heat dissipation, surge protection, harmonic data, and commissioning documentation for Vanuatu's 230/400 V, 50 Hz system. The frequency is not the gap; the voltage difference, URA-regulated utility acceptance, weak island-grid feeders, cyclone exposure, and coastal salt-mist conditions are the practical gaps. A China 220/380 V configuration without documented 230/400 V acceptance is not Vanuatu grid-ready.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认输入电压范围、过/欠压阈值、断路器和RCD额定值、电缆选型、散热能力、浪涌保护、谐波数据及调试文件适用于瓦努阿图230/400 V、50 Hz系统。频率不是差距；电压差异、URA监管下的公用事业验收、岛国弱馈线、气旋暴露及沿海盐雾条件才是实务差距。未形成230/400 V适用文件的中国220/380 V配置不满足瓦努阿图并网准备要求。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認輸入電壓範圍、過/欠壓閾值、斷路器和RCD額定值、電纜選型、散熱能力、浪湧保護、諧波數據及調試文件適用於萬那杜230/400 V、50 Hz系統。頻率不是差距；電壓差異、URA監管下的公用事業驗收、島國弱饋線、氣旋暴露及沿海鹽霧條件才是實務差距。未形成230/400 V適用文件的中國220/380 V配置不滿足萬那杜併網準備要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at project level - grid-connected charger installations require review and acceptance by the relevant URA-regulated utility or concessionaire, including UNELCO or VUI where applicable
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a Vanuatu utility approval substitute; Vanuatu 230/400 V ratings must be documented

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Vanuatu uses the same 50 Hz frequency as China but a different 230/400 V nominal voltage. Treat voltage range, protection settings, URA-regulated utility acceptance, cyclone exposure, and site commissioning as Vanuatu-specific checks before shipment or installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 瓦努阿图与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压为不同的230/400 V。出货或安装前，应将电压范围、保护设置、URA监管下的公用事业验收、气旋暴露和现场调试作为瓦努阿图专门核查项处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 萬那杜與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓為不同的230/400 V。出貨或安裝前，應將電壓範圍、保護設置、URA監管下的公用事業驗收、氣旋暴露和現場調試作為萬那杜專門核查項處理。
